deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: 3 bed/2 full/2 half, 2972 sqft, built 1994. Pool and outdoor kitchen. VA loan $489.5K payoff. Underwater $93K-$143K. Listing terminated May 29 - Matt and Chandler moving back in to make updates and repairs, plan to relist later.

Full market analysis completed, underwater situation confirmed, three options presented

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3 bed/2.5 bath, 1886 sqft, 2011 build. Listed May 14. Sellers relocating to NC, second week of June deadline. Multiple interested buyers, second-look buyers are hottest lead. Potential hairline foundation crack.

Investor cash offer discussed at $176,300, keeping conversation open

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3 bed/2 bath, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres, built 1994. Payoff $257K approx. Divorce situation, going through. Colton looking for contractor work. Recommended list price $295K, net to sellers about $14.7K.
